description: Verso: Fragment from near the beginning of a state document in Arabic script. Mainly preserving blessings for someone powerful (وصيانته ومراعاته وحراسته . . . وحماية(؟) . . . وفيض الابدي . . . ). Huge letters, chancery hand, wide space between the lines.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
